{{Infobox artifact
| name = Suriel's Razor
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel]]'s [[Razor]] is a powerful, multifunctional weapon held by [[Suriel]], the Sixth [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]]. While it appears as a dormant, meter-long bar of blue [[steel]] when sheathed, the weapon can expand into an active form resembling a glowing, branching skeleton of blue metal. Though it is sometimes referred to as a [[sword]], its true identity is that of an incredibly complex and potent scalpel. It was passed down to the current [[Suriel]] by her predecessor, who eventually relinquished both the weapon and the title of [[Suriel]] to live a mortal [[life]]. The [[Razor]] serves as much more than a tool for combat; it is primarily an instrument of restoration and healing. It functions by removing corruption, toxic energy, hostile intentions, and parasites. When fueled by the power of the [[Way]] through [[Suriel]]'s mantle, the weapon can perform monumental feats of reconstruction, such as mending the fabric of space, reversing stellar explosions, and restoring shattered planets or even bringing the deceased back to [[life]]. In combat, it is capable of slicing through high-powered projectiles and severing massive attacks from existence.}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Suriel]]'s weapon is called [[Suriel's Razor]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Suriel's Razor]] can expand from a meter-long bar of blue [[steel]] into a skeleton of blue metal containing a web of light.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Suriel's Razor]] was intended as an instrument of healing.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Suriel]]’s [[Razor]] is a meter-long ruler of blue [[steel]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c1">''Underlord'', chapter 1</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Razor]] of [[Suriel]] is an obsolete [[Judge]] weapon prototype.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c10">''Reaper'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
